allow: PowerShell(firebase projects:list --json | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty result | Where-Object { $_.projectId -eq 'academyplatform-12c05' } | Format-List projectId, displayName, projectNumber)
PowerShell(flutter clean; Write-Output "=== D: free after clean ==="; Get-PSDrive D | Select-Object @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,2\)}}, @{N='UsedGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB,2\)}})
PowerShell(flutter clean 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2; Write-Output "=== D: free after cleanup ==="; df -h /d 2>$null; Get-PSDrive D | Select-Object @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,2\)}})

PowerShell($nuget = "C:\\Users\\ephed\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links\\nuget.exe"; Write-Output "=== nuget exists? ==="; Test-Path $nuget; Write-Output "=== run nuget install WIL to scratch dir ==="; & $nuget install Microsoft.Windows.ImplementationLibrary -Version 1.0.220914.1 -ExcludeVersion -OutputDirectory "$env:TEMP\\nugettest" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 25)

Bash(cd ~/AppData/Local/Pub/Cache/hosted/pub.dev/material_table_view-5.5.1; sed -n '1,90p' lib/src/table_typedefs.dart; echo "=====TABLEVIEW CTOR====="; grep -n "TableView.builder\\|required\\|this\\." lib/src/table_view.dart | head -80)

Bash(cd ~/AppData/Local/Pub/Cache/hosted/pub.dev/material_table_view-5.5.1; grep -n "const TableColumn\\|this\\.\\|required this" lib/src/table_column.dart | head -40; echo "===headerHeight/footerHeight==="; grep -n "headerHeight\\|footerHeight" lib/src/table_view.dart | head)

PowerShell(Get-PSDrive -PSProvider FileSystem | Select-Object Name, @{N='UsedGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB,1\)}}, @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; "build dir size:"; if \(Test-Path 'D:\\mini projects\\academy_platform\\build'\) { '{0:N1} GB' -f \(\(Get-ChildItem 'D:\\mini projects\\academy_platform\\build' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1GB\) })
PowerShell(flutter clean; if \($?\) { Get-PSDrive D | Select-Object @{N='FreeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,1\)}} })
